title: Introducing Notion Emed

posts.author: manishaghosh (MG)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Everyone!

Introducing Notion Embed. Embed your public Notion pages or Workspaces effortlessly. Visit the marketplace page : https://monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000560/notion-embed

Struggling with Notion Pages not working in iFrame or with other Embedding apps. This app lets you exclusively embed Notion pages in your monday.com Board or Dashboard.


First1920×960 66.6 KB

second1920×960 116 KB

Benefits:

  • Embed your published Notion pages in your monday.com account

  • Use as Wiki for your Organization

  • Avoid iFrame Embedding error for Notion pages (Notion pages do not support iFrame embedding)

  • Avoid having to go to external window to access your Notion Documentation

  • Have one or multiple Notion pages for every Board

  • Use as Board View or Dashboard widget

Who this app is for:

  • anyone using both monday.com and Notion

  • if your organization is maintaining Notion workspaces along with monday.com and is looking for a solution to connect both

  • if you are having trouble adding your Notion page in your monday.com account
